rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Have Petitioner Declared A Vexatious Ligitant And Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to declare Norman Herterich a Vexatious Litigant is denied. The motion for sanctions is also denied. The requirements of CCP Section 391(b)(3) have not been met; and Herterich was represented by counsel for the vast majority of the litigation. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the court's tentative shall notify the court and opposing counsel/ party no later than February 4, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
